title: Qwnks's Console Experience
description: Qwnks's Console Experience, or QCE, Aims to Enhance many aspects of Minecraft while staying Lightweight, Vanilla-ish, and featuring Controller Support!
body:
# Qwnks's Console Experience!

## General Information
**Qwnks's Console Experience's** goal is to enhance **Minecraft** while remaining **Lightweight**, **Optimized**, and remaining mostly **Vanilla**.

## Performance
It's packed with Performace mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **MANY** more.

## Up To Date
**Qwnks's Console Experience** will receive updates every 2 weeks or so as to ensure mods are up to date and remain compatible!

## Built On Fabric
**Qwnks's Console Experience** uses **Fabric mod loader** which is **lightweight**, **fast**, and supports a whole bunch of mods!

## VulkanMod Compatible
**Qwnk's Console Experience** (Though it's currently in **Alpha**) has support for **VulkanMod** which heavily improves performance as compared to **Sodium**, though it does come at the cost of **Iris**, **Sodium**, and **Shaders**.

## Open Devlopment 
Most if not all the mods in **Qwnks's Console Experience** are **open source**, which means this modpack is too!

## FAQ 
- **Q:** What mods does the modpack have?
- **A:** Click on any version and just scroll down!

- **Q:** How Can I Contribute?
- **A:** Click On Our Donation Link(s)!
